title: 日本ダービーの後に・誰かの夢の次は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky deals with her frustrating loss in the
Japanese Derby, the second race of the Classic
Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, Special Week, whose dream
was crushed, is consumed by regret. But she
quickly begins to burn with renewed passion for
the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky sees this display of strength as a
challenge. We continue on our path to the Kikuka
Sho, the final Classic Triple Crown race.
